ItacPersonItem.Notes: Professor of medicine at the University of Padua as from 1621. It is not clear when he joined the Ricovrati. A distinguished orator, he was assassinated by the Venetian student G. B. Tunisi, who suspected that Albanese had opposed his degree.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
